metadata.description: Go to imdb.com/list/create/, fill in the list name 'My Sci-Fi Favorites', and submit — verifying the ListCreate mutation fires.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: On IMDb, navigate to the 'Create a new list' page, enter the name 'My Sci-Fi Favorites', keep the default List Type as 'Titles', set Privacy to 'Private', and click Create.
